chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Reward of Giving Respite to the Indebted

text: 1703 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «مَنْ أَرَادَ أَنْ يُظِلَّهُ اَللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ يَوْمَ لاَ ظِلَّ إِلاَّ ظِلُّهُ فَلْيُنْظِرْ مُعْسِراً أَوْ لِيَدَعْ لَهُ مِنْ حَقِّهِ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.1703 - Imam (as) said: "Whoever wishes for Allah (swt), the Almighty and Glorious, to shade him on the Day when there will be no shade but His, let him grant respite to an insolvent person or forgo some of his due."
